name: Steamed Rice and Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 3 cups water to a boil in an outer pot.
2. Add all ingredients (arborio rice, red lentils, veggie broth powder) to the inner pot and place it in the boiling water of the outer pot.
3. Bring the contents of the inner pot to a boil with the simmering water from the outer pot.
4. Cover the inner pot and steam for 20 minutes.
5. If the cooked mixture is still too moist, let it sit over the hot water when you remove the pot from the heat until it reaches an appropriate consistency.
You can vary the seasonings as desired. If you have more time, use brown rice and green lentils (adding allspice to this combination). Any combinations of grains and legumes that cook in about the same amount of time would work.
